docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-16-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-25-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 DEFENDANT CHALLENGES VENUE. VENUE IS PROPER. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CAL STATE PATROL SERVICE, INC. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO APPEAR. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
